name: docker-compose-app-install
description: Reusable Codex skill for safely installing new self-hosted apps into an existing Docker Compose stack without touching unrelated services.

interface.shortDescription: Safely install new apps into an existing Docker Compose stack.
interface.longDescription: Adds a reusable Codex workflow for installing self-hosted applications into an existing Docker Compose stack with backup, validation, no global restarts, persistent volumes, reverse proxy detection, resource optimization, and rollback.
defaultPrompt: Use Docker Compose App Install to add a new self-hosted app into the current compose stack without touching unrelated services.
Install the requested app into this existing docker-compose.yml with backups, validation, persistent volumes, and rollback.
